§6Wireless Fluid Terminal§f

§aFluid access from anywhere.§f

The §bWireless Fluid Terminal§f combines wireless access with fluid storage management. View and manage fluids from anywhere.

§6Specifications§f:
§b•§f Channels: §e0§f (wireless)
§b•§f Function: view, insert, extract fluids
§b•§f Range: depends on Wireless Boosters

§6How It Works§f:
Functions identically to the §bME Fluid Terminal§f but wirelessly. Right-click with a fluid container to deposit/withdraw.

§6Crafting Recipe§f:
§b•§f §b1× Wireless Terminal§f
§b•§f §b1× ME Fluid Terminal§f
§b•§f §b1× Formation Core§f

§6Strategic Role§f:
The §bWireless Fluid Terminal§f is the §9fluid version§f of the wireless toolkit. Useful for:
§b•§f §aRemote fluid management§f at outposts
§b•§f §aFarming operations§f (water/fertilizer distribution)
§b•§f §aNether-base fluid access§f
§b•§f §aLava collection in remote areas§f

§eTip§f: Pair with a §bWireless Crafting Terminal§f and §bWireless Pattern Terminal§f for complete wireless AE2 functionality.
